Personal Loan Via RupeeQ

A personal loan through RupeeQ offers quick, hassle-free access to funds for your urgent needs—whether it's a medical emergency, wedding, travel, or home renovation. With a wide network of trusted banks and NBFCs, RupeeQ helps you compare and choose the best loan offers, interest rates, and repayment options. You can check your eligibility instantly, apply online in minutes, and even track your credit score to improve loan approval chances—all in one place.

Why RupeeQ?

  • Check Credit Score for Free using RupeeQ ACE
  • Compare Best Offers from RupeeQ Partners
  • Loan Amounts Ranging from ₹ 50,000 to ₹ 50,00,000
  • Quick & Safe Disbursal Process
  • No Spam Calls, Only Dedicated Loan Expert

Features and Benefits of Personal Loan

Types of Personal Loans
You Can Get via RupeeQ

Loan Type Loan Amount Best For
Short Term Personal Loan Up to ₹5 Lakh Emergency expenses, small-ticket purchases
Express Personal Loan ₹1 Lakh to ₹50 Lakh Weddings, travel, medical needs, home renovation
Overdraft Facility Flexible Credit Line Pay interest only on the amount used

Eligibility Criteria for Personal Loans

Age: Between 21 to 60 years
Employment: Salaried or self-employed with a stable income
Minimum Income: ₹15,000 per month (varies by lender)
Credit Score: Preferably 680 and above for better offers
Documents Required: PAN, Aadhaar, salary slips/bank statements

A personal loan is the money lent to an individual from a bank or NBFC for a short-term at pre-determined interest rates. The money can be used to fulfill any immediate or critical needs of an individual.
